nasb.text: God called the light day, and the darkness He called night. And there was evening and there was morning, one day.

esv.text: God called the light Day, and the darkness he called Night. And there was evening and there was morning, the first day.

cnv.text: 神稱光為晝，稱暗為夜。有晚上，有早晨；這是第一日。

ccb.text: 称光为昼，称暗为夜。晚上过去，早晨到来，这是第一天。

csbs.text: 神称光为“昼”，称黑暗为“夜”。有晚上，有早晨；这是第一日。
